facebook.content:
"But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." - Matthew 6:33

As we prioritize our lives, are we seeking the eternal, unshakable things of the Kingdom above the fleeting concerns of this world? Or are we allowing the worries of everyday life to dictate our focus? What will be your top priority today: the fleeting or the eternal?
facebook.fullPost:
"But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." - Matthew 6:33

As we prioritize our lives, are we seeking the eternal, unshakable things of the Kingdom above the fleeting concerns of this world? Or are we allowing the worries of everyday life to dictate our focus? What will be your top priority today: the fleeting or the eternal?

Start your Kingdom journey

instagram.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of talk but of power." - 1 Corinthians 4:20

In today's culture of empty words and hollow promises, it's easy to confuse talk with true power. But the Kingdom of God demands more: it demands that our words be backed by action, that our faith be demonstrated through obedience.

What area of your life needs the demonstration of true power?

tiktok.content:
"For the kingdom of God is not a matter of eating and drinking, but of righteousness, peace and joy in the Holy Spirit." - Romans 14:17

As believers, we often prioritize earthly pursuits over the true power of the Kingdom.
